issues.original_text: All configs are defined in a master configuration YAML file, which serves as the stateful representation of every data point to be swept, including core settings like ISL/OSL, EP, TP, DP, MTP, and so on.
issues.description: The acronym MTP was not expanded, while all other preceding acronyms in the same list (ISL, OSL, EP, TP, DP) were. This creates an inconsistency.
issues.why_it_matters: Consistent handling of technical acronyms is crucial for clarity and professionalism. The glossary provides the expansion '多 Token 预测 (MTP)', and it should be used here on its first significant mention, just like the other terms.
issues.suggestion: Expand MTP according to the glossary. Change '...数据并行 (DP)、MTP 等核心设置' to '...数据并行 (DP)、多 Token 预测 (MTP) 等核心设置'.

issues.original_text: We now trigger sweeps based on additions to a changelog at the root of the repo.
issues.description: The translated sentence '现在，我们通过触发机制来运行遍历测试，触发器是代码仓库根目录下的 更新日志 的新增条目' is slightly convoluted and exhibits a translationese structure ('We do X via Y, where Y is Z').
issues.why_it_matters: A more direct phrasing would improve readability and make the text sound more natural and authoritative, aligning better with the desired analyst tone.
issues.suggestion: Rephrase for a more direct flow, for example: '现在，我们改为根据代码仓库根目录下更新日志 (changelog) 的新增内容来触发遍历测试。'

issues.original_text: ...更新日志 的新增条目...在一个 主 YAML 配置文件 中...
issues.description: The translation includes non-standard spaces around highlighted Chinese terms like '更新日志' and '主 YAML 配置文件'.
issues.why_it_matters: Standard Chinese typography does not use spaces to segment words. Removing these artifacts improves professionalism and readability. Note that a space between Chinese characters and Latin letters (like in '主 YAML') is correct and should be maintained.
issues.suggestion: Remove the extraneous spaces. Change '...下的 更新日志 的新增条目' to '...下的更新日志的新增条目' and '在一个 主 YAML 配置文件 中' to '在一个主 YAML 配置文件中'.
